notes: Coordinates are map-anchor coordinates for a customary city, town, island, or ceremonial area associated with the festival.
Many festivals are mobile, multi-site, lunar, or diaspora-observed; anchors are intentionally stable for mapping, not exact route geometry.
Fields are intended as a seed dataset for application use and later editorial cleanup.

fields.name: Primary English display name
fields.country_or_countries: One or more countries or broader observing regions
fields.city_or_locality: Anchor place name for map pinning
fields.date_notes: Season/date notes; often variable for lunar festivals
fields.heritage_recognized: Boolean indicating likely UNESCO or similar heritage linkage/recognition, used as seed-level flag only

entries.name: Lunar New Year
entries.date_notes: Late January to February; date varies
entries.summary: Major new year festival celebrated across the Sinosphere and global diaspora communities.
